rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Line 25 'That is the practitioner shape' uses 'practitioner' (the AE101-cultivated character noun, allowed). No 'practice' as noun in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Earn every technical term on first use.
